parsed.generic_mechanism: Concrete scenes paired with escalating consequences create stronger momentum than repeated qualification of an already-established distinction.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A establishes a lucid distinction between agency and inherited expectation, supported by a sustained restaurant metaphor and varied social examples. Repeated caveats, deferred answers, and an expansive recap drain momentum after the central idea has landed.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B uses memorable household scenes, sensory provocations, and compact analogies to keep a forceful argument moving. Sweeping declarations, abrupt causal leaps, and the extended attack on dieting reduce precision, but the voice remains vivid and propulsive.
